# Treino em Casa: Mulher Workout · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)


## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 5, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _mrgslo_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "I’ve been using this app since 2018. I used to really love it. Every workout was free (without ads) and there was a lot to choose from. In the past couple months they’ve put everything behind a paywall and randomly during my workouts the app redirects me to Shein’s website. This is extremely disappointing."
            2. _K3kio_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "Hi, I subscribed to what I thought was a year plan for 39.99 and a 6 day trial. It did not let me know before the trail was over so I couldn’t cancel it. I was going to keep it but then discovered that it was 39.99 per month not 39.99 for the entire year. This was very misleading. When I tried to go into your app to see my subscription detail I could not find it any where. I would like a refund of the money that was taken out of my account. And I have already cancelled my subscription"
            3. _pinkbarbwire_, Jul 10, 2026, 1/5: "i used this app back in 2023 to lose weight i downloaded it back in 2026 EVERYTHING requires money , everything is behind a paywall.. why make a app free if you’re gonna do mini in-app purchases for everything."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: May 31, 2026 - Jun 22, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _kyacma_, Jun 22, 2026, 1/5: "I do not care if I have to watch ads but what I do care about is if I get a pop up screen with no continuation option only advertising the paid version. The workout is available with ads yet the interface traps you with their predatory ads."
            2. _JustChezza_, May 31, 2026, 5/5: "I love this app for quick HIIT sessions. It is tailored for all fitness levels, and you do not need any equipment. The free version has a lot of annoying ads, and many plans are locked, but you can still do several one-off exercises. However, they usually offer really good deals on the premium version. The premium plans are great and offer so much variety, which is perfect if you need a little motivation and are limited on time. While it won't be for everyone and isn't meant for heavy weightlifters, it is excellent for quick daily sessions."
